title: Diagnose
body: Clarify the audience, offer, operational friction and measurable goal before touching the visuals.

title: Design
body: Turn brand, content and interface decisions into a language the team can reuse.

title: Deploy
body: Ship campaigns, websites, automations and assets that can be used in the real workflow.

title: Learn
body: Read the data, tighten the workflow and make the next iteration faster and sharper.
